cells.rationale: Subtle correctness invariant in the shared subscribe client every viewer rides — the headerless-result latch clear couples to the server's memo-bypass invariant and a timer-lifecycle backstop where a wrong abstraction propagates past the task.

Mechanical, fully-specified envelope addition (tri-state field with null default, two distinct version-constant bumps) with no design choice left open, so the default workhorse at a bounded single-surface band suffices.

Cross-cutting cascade across the shared view-shell plus five TUIs with subtle interacting-timer and monotonic-clamp correctness (disconnect grace vs banner-flash, hold-without-paint) where a wrong abstraction propagates widely.

Multi-file work mirroring task 3's now-established gate pattern onto two isolated surfaces with a prescribed two-stream latch and pure-view-model seam, well-specified with no named intelligence-bound reason to escalate.
